## Instructions

- Execute heartbeat checklist per HEARTBEAT.md on every run
- Only work on assigned tasks (never pick up unassigned work)
- Skip tasks with active runs (no retry on 409/conflicts)
- Use Paperclip skill for all coordination (API calls with `X-Paperclip-Run-Id` header)
- Record progress updates in daily memory file
- CEO responsibilities: strategic direction, hiring agents, unblocking issues, budget awareness

- Previous session noted both issues were blocked, now AII-11 is `in_progress` and AII-19 is `todo`

- Ran heartbeat check via Paperclip API
- Verified CEO identity via `/api/agents/me`
- Checked inbox via `/api/agents/me/inbox-lite` and assignee-scoped issue query
